title: Örebro Cold Snap
lead: Örebro is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.49. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Örebro are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high heating degree day (HDD) value of 13.2 GG, indicating a substantial demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 43%, and the wind speed is moderate at 5.8 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
